home.subtitle: Your app is ready to go.

profilePrompt.title: Set up your BMI profile
profilePrompt.subtitle: Add your height, weight, age, and activity level so we can calculate a daily calorie target for you.

meals.title: Meals for today
meals.subtitle: Most recent first
meals.emptySubtitle: Add your first meal to start tracking calories and macros today.

statsScreen.title: My Activity
statsScreen.subtitle: Quick view of calories, workouts, and weight changes.

macros.title: Macro split
macros.subtitle: Protein, carb, and fat intake logged for today.
macros.empty: No macro data logged for today.

todayProgress.title: Today's progress
todayProgress.subtitle: Track how your calorie intake compares with your current goal.

trends.title: Calorie trends
trends.subtitle: Total calorie intake grouped by day and month.

macroDistribution.title: Macro distribution by period
macroDistribution.subtitle: Stacked bars showing protein, carbs, and fat for each day or month.

addScreen.title: Add Food
addScreen.currentMealSubtitle: These are the items in the meal you are building.
addScreen.emptyTitle: No items in this meal yet
addScreen.emptySubtitle: Pick from favorites or add one manually, from a photo, or from barcode.
addScreen.favoriteFoodsSubtitle: Quickly pick from your saved foods and add them into the current meal.
addScreen.favoriteEmptySubtitle: Try another keyword or create a new food in your library.
addScreen.saveError: Could not save the meal. Please try again.
addScreen.aiAnalysisFallback: AI is not fully confident about this meal yet. Please review it in the form.
addScreen.aiAnalysisError: Unable to analyze the food photo right now.
addScreen.clearMealMessage: Are you sure you want to remove every item from this meal?
addScreen.modalSubtitle: Pick how you want to capture this food entry.

scanFood.title: Scan your meal
scanFood.body: Open the camera, snap the dish, and we will estimate calories and macros for you.

barcode.title: Scan packaged food
barcode.body: Use barcode mode for drinks, snacks, and labels to get product nutrition faster.

manual.title: Enter food manually
manual.body: Create a food entry yourself when the camera is not needed or the result needs a quick correction.

manualFoodEntry.title: Food form
manualFoodEntry.subtitle: Add or edit a food item in one place before saving it.
manualFoodEntry.photoHint: Tap the photo area to capture or replace the current food image.
manualFoodEntry.favoriteSectionHint: Tap to load values into the form, or long press to save it straight to today.

favoritesScreen.title: Food library
favoritesScreen.subtitle: Foods you created so they are ready for quick meal logging.
favoritesScreen.addFavoriteAction: Add a new food to the library
favoritesScreen.removeMessage: Are you sure you want to remove {{mealName}} from the food library?
favoritesScreen.emptySubtitle: Create a food once and reuse it later when building meals.
favoritesScreen.filteredEmptySubtitle: Try a different day or search keyword to see more foods in the library.

welcomeScreen.title: BMI Profile
welcomeScreen.subtitle: Set up your BMI details once so the app can personalize daily calorie goals.
welcomeScreen.formSubtitle: We use age, gender, height, current weight, your monthly weight plan, and activity to estimate daily calories and macro targets.
welcomeScreen.summaryBody: BMI {{bmi}}, maintenance at {{maintenanceCalories}} kcal/day, and target at {{calorieTarget}} kcal/day.

profileScreen.title: Nutrition profile
profileScreen.subtitle: Quick view of BMI, maintenance calories, target calories, and your macro goals.
profileScreen.emptySubtitle: Complete the welcome setup so the app can calculate your calorie target.
profileScreen.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete the current nutrition profile?
profileScreen.resetConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete your local data and any synced nutrition data in Supabase?
profileScreen.resetSuccess: All nutrition data has been reset.
profileScreen.logoutConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to log out of this linked account?
profileScreen.actionError: Unable to update data right now. Please try again.

account.title: Sync account
account.anonymousSubtitle: Protect your synced meals and photos by linking this anonymous session to a real account.
account.connectedSubtitle: Your synced data is already attached to an account you can use on another device.
account.providerLinked: A sign-in provider is linked to this account.
account.dangerSubtitle: Manage the linked sync account and remove synced data when needed.
account.linkEmailSuccess: Check your email to finish linking this account.
account.actionError: Unable to link this account right now.

profileScreen.deleteSyncAccountConfirmMessage: This removes synced Supabase data for the current account and disconnects it from this device. Local data on this device will be kept.
profileScreen.deleteSyncAccountSuccess: Linked sync account removed from this device.

debug.resetAnonymousSessionMessage: This clears the current Supabase session on this device so the app can create a new anonymous account again.
debug.resetAnonymousSessionSuccess: Anonymous session reset. The app will create a new anonymous account when needed.

auth.welcomeBackSubtitle: Sign in to continue tracking your nutrition and keep your data in sync.
auth.loginTitle: Log in to your sync account
auth.loginSubtitle: Use an existing account to load your synced nutrition data on this device.
auth.loginSubtitleAnonymous: Log in only if you already have an account. To protect this anonymous session, use Create account instead.
auth.registerSubtitle: Create a new account so your nutrition data can be recovered on another device.
auth.registerUpgradeSubtitle: Link this anonymous session to email, Google, or Apple so you can recover your data later.
auth.loginFailed: Unable to log in right now.
auth.registerFailed: Unable to create or protect this account right now.

foodDetail.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete {{mealName}} from today's log?

showcase.title: UI Showcase
showcase.subtitle: A single screen to exercise shared components and interaction states.
showcase.profileSubtitle: Use this tab to check spacing, motion, and theme behavior quickly.

metrics.componentsHint: Buttons, forms, feedback, and layout primitives

showcase.emailHelper: Useful when you want to test helper text and icon alignment.
showcase.notesPlaceholder: Write a short note for this sample transaction...

list.primarySubtitle: Tap patterns, alignment, and accessory slots
list.secondarySubtitle: Count badge and mixed leading/right content

accordion.tokensBody: Spacing, typography, and colors should stay aligned across light and dark themes.
accordion.formsBody: Use this section to verify focus styles, selection states, and bottom-sheet interactions.

empty.title: No preview selected
empty.message: Pick any control above to inspect spacing and interactive behavior.

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.message: The app ran into an unexpected error. Please try again.

errors.title: Error
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.usernameMin: Username must be at least 3 characters
validation.usernameMax: Username must be at most 20 characters
validation.usernameFormat: Username can only contain letters, numbers, and underscores

camera.title: Camera
camera.scanHint: Align the QR code inside the frame to scan it automatically.
camera.barcodeHint: Align the barcode inside the frame to scan it automatically.
camera.captureFailed: Could not capture the photo. Please try again.
camera.scanFailed: Could not scan the code. Please try again.
